name: Love Song in Winter
overview: Since the anesthesiologist Lu Yan “runs into” her dead college friend Deng Man during a night shift, strange things around her occur successively. As the investigation proceeds, the detective Jiang Chengyi, Lu Yan’s ex-boyfriend from many years ago, is embroiled in it, and the long-hidden truth of eight years is gradually revealed.

trailers.title: Stay tuned | Trailer: Huang Jingyu and Sun Qian’s winter love | 冬至 Love Song in Winter | iQIYI
